Name: Rocket motors RD1-20-5
Purpose: a small solid-fuel model rocket motor designed to provide thrust for lightweight hobby rockets. It includes an ignition element and a built-in delay with ejection charge for recovery system deployment.

Name: Servo SG90
Purpose: Will operate TVC and open the recovery mechanism in the cone.

Name: esp32
Purpose: a microcontroller board that acts as the brain of the system. It reads sensors, runs the code, and sends control signals to other components such as servos.

Name: protoboard
Purpose: a perforated board used for soldering and connecting electronic components into a more permanent circuit. It helps organize wiring and mount parts like the ESP32 and sensor modules.

Name: BMP580
Purpose: a digital barometric pressure sensor used to estimate altitude and pressure changes. It is useful for tracking vertical movement and flight state.
